evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: test-driven development; CI/CD processes; clean code; consistent KPI definitions; structured branching strategies
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Classified as rigour because responsibilities explicitly require test-driven development, CI/CD process support, clean code standards, and consistent KPI definitions — with no velocity or speed-to-ship signals.
evidence.domain_risk: leading live commerce/media platform for home shopping across TV, online, and social media
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Classified as moderate because HSE24 is an e-commerce/media company where errors affect business decisions and product metrics without regulatory or direct financial reporting consequence.
evidence.data_team_maturity: data platform teams; Build and maintain data models with DBT and Snowflake
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Classified as mid because 'data platform teams' implies existing distinct sub-teams and named tools (DBT, Snowflake) appear in responsibilities, indicating an existing and growing data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Build and maintain data models with DBT and Snowflake using dimensional modelling; test-driven development; structured branching strategies
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Classified as hiring_manager because specific tools (DBT, Snowflake), methodology (dimensional modelling), and engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, structured branching) in responsibilities clearly describe the Tuesday morning work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: automated self-service BI solutions with consistent KPI definitions; data platform teams and business units
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Classified as internal_data because the primary output is self-service BI solutions and consistent KPI definitions serving internal data consumers across the organisation.
evidence.autonomy_level: conceptualise and optimise BI solutions; translate business requirements into analytics deliverables
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Classified as mixed because 'conceptualise and optimise' signals strategic input while 'translate business requirements into deliverables' signals execution in service of business stakeholders.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool usage or AI infrastructure enablement is mentioned anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: apply modern development standards including clean code and test-driven development
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Classified as responsibility because 'apply modern development standards including test-driven development' frames TDD as a named practice the candidate is responsible for implementing, not just a skill to list.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: test-driven development; CI/CD processes; consistent KPI definitions
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Classified as moderate because TDD, CI/CD, and consistent KPI definitions signal operational reliability concerns, but the framing is delivery-oriented with no compliance or audit language.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: optimise BI solutions; build and maintain data models
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Classified as fix_scale because the role is to optimise existing BI solutions and maintain data models within an established data platform, not build from scratch.
evidence.language_gate: Fluent English; German language skills preferred
evidence.loss_aversion: test-driven development; CI/CD processes — operational reliability and code quality focus, but no compliance or trust-failure framing.
